title: CCTV NVR Host CPU and Memory Resource Saturation
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-24h
| eval cpu=tonumber(coalesce(cpu_util_pct, host_cpu_pct, ""))
| eval mem=tonumber(coalesce(mem_util_pct, ram_used_pct, ""))
| where cpu>85 OR mem>90
| timechart span=5m avg(cpu) avg(mem) by nvr_name
description: Recorder saturation drops frames and delays exports during incidents.
value: Justifies scale-out or GPU offload before renewal.
implementation: (1) Agent or API poll. (2) Correlate with analytics enablement.
grandmaExplanation: We monitor recorder computer load so video processing keeps up.
